issues.description: Use diverse coach don't only use the rohan coach make sure we have more than 20 coaches in that 15 female coaches
issues.reviewReason: There are already 13 coaches in the roster (9 female, 4 male: Nisha, Priya, Meera, Tara, Zara, Hana, Luna, Amira, Reva + Rohan, Kabir, Atlas, Kai) — you happened to be assigned Rohan. To reach your target (20+ coaches, 15 female) I need to add ~7 more, and EACH new coach needs an OpenAI-generated portrait (scripts/_gen_coach_portraits.py) — but OpenAI is billing-capped right now, so I can't generate them. I'll also make the assignment rotate diversely (female-weighted) so it's not always Rohan, but verifying that needs onboarding, which is itself OpenAI-blocked (see ddd1). Plan once you raise the OpenAI billing limit: add the new female-majority coaches + generate portraits + ship diverse assignment.

issues.description: Error
issues.reviewReason: This 'Error' is the onboarding 'Still finishing your plan / Try again' screen, and it's a direct symptom of the OpenAI billing outage: /onboarding/finalize self-heals the diet + workout via OpenAI, which is returning 429 (billing hard limit) — so the plan can't be built and NEW USERS CANNOT COMPLETE ONBOARDING right now. Fix = raise the OpenAI billing limit / add credits in the OpenAI dashboard (same blocker as the coach chat / meal-photo / AI-plan outage). Onboarding recovers automatically once billing is restored.

issues.description: Short animation sound and only show the badges animation after the onboarding dons add badges on the onboarding
issues.reviewReason: Badge animation (make it short + add sound, only play AFTER onboarding completes, and add badges into the onboarding). This is the post-onboarding achievement celebration — to implement and VERIFY it I need to complete an onboarding run, which is currently broken by the OpenAI billing outage (see ddd1: /finalize 429s). I'll build it (short celebration, gate it to fire only after onboarding, and route the badge sound through the new app-wide Sounds toggle from i-20260617-55ab) as soon as onboarding works again once you raise the OpenAI billing limit.

issues.description: This activity card is not clickable

fix.description: Root cause: only the Activity card's title linked to /activity; the rest of the card did nothing. Fix: DashboardActivityCard now mirrors the diet card - a full-area button (absolute inset-0) navigates to /activity behind a pointer-events-none content layer whose inner buttons (Customize, Generate) keep their own taps. Verified: tapping the card body now navigates to the Activity page.

issues.description: Don't show the checkbook if it's has a error like this
issues.reviewReason: This is the strength workout exercise list (same screen as the resolved 463e). The QA test login is walking-only (starter tier) and renders the 'your training is your walk' view, so I cannot reproduce, fix, or verify the exercise-row checkbox / 'No previous data' error on it. I'll implement 'hide the checkbox when it would only surface that error' the moment I can render this screen — please share a strength-tier test login (same ask as 463e) and I'll fix + verify it.

issues.description: Fix blur

fix.description: Root cause: the notifications list used a top+bottom fade mask, so the first row (the TODAY section header) sat in the top fade zone and rendered washed-out / blurry. Fix: the mask now fades ONLY the bottom edge - the top is fully opaque. Verified: TODAY and the first card are crisp; the bottom still soft-fades past the fold.

issues.description: Don't detect the system dark mode and auto dark the app, make the ligh theme by default and keep the option to change to the dark mode in the profile page.

fix.description: Root cause: default theme was 'system', so the app followed the device and auto-darkened. Fix: default is now Light and the System option is removed entirely (ThemeContext + ProfileAppearance) - the app never follows the OS scheme; a legacy 'system' preference coerces to Light. The manual Light/Dark toggle stays in Profile - Appearance. Verified: a fresh user loads in Light (no .dark class) and the picker shows Light/Dark only.

issues.description: Rename this and make this about the all the application sounds

fix.description: Renamed the Profile setting 'Workout sounds' to 'Sounds' and broadened it to the whole app: 'Play sound effects across the app - workouts, achievements, and alerts.' The toggle already gated every audio cue, so it IS the app-wide sound switch; added isAppSoundEnabled/setAppSoundEnabled aliases (same nyus_workout_sounds key) so future sound sources use one switch. Verified live on Profile.

issues.description: This is not linked we have complete the meals right plan this and do it

fix.description: Root cause: the dashboard challenge card read 'completed' straight off the stored row, but completion was only stamped by the NIGHTLY job — so logging your 4th meal didn't flip the card to Done until the next day ('not linked'). Fix (deployed, backend f56aacf): GET /gamification/weekly-challenge now evaluates completion ON READ (idempotent evaluate_weekly_challenge — no-ops once done, awards XP once), committing if it just completed. Verified live on prod: the endpoint now evaluates on every read and returns the current state (no error). The card flips to Done the instant the weekly target is met — please confirm on your account where the meals are complete.

issues.description: Fix coach only give 4 exercise make sure it's based on the questioner answered and make a proper plan more than 5-6 exercises and a proper plan
issues.reviewReason: Workout plan generation (more exercises, questionnaire-driven, 5-6+ per day, proper plan) is produced by the AI workout builder, which calls OpenAI — currently billing-capped (429). I can't generate/iterate plans until the OpenAI billing limit is raised (same blocker as onboarding ddd1 + coach chat). Once restored I'll tune the generator to honor the questionnaire and produce fuller plans. (The screenshot also shows the level-up confetti during the builder — tracked separately under 8ef2.)

issues.description: This issue when I press let coach nisha build the breakfast
issues.reviewReason: 'Let Coach Nisha build the breakfast' fails because the AI meal builder calls OpenAI, which is billing-capped (429) — the screenshot's 'No ideas matched your preferences' is the AI meal-generation failing. Blocked until the OpenAI billing limit is raised (same root cause as ddd1 / afe0). Recovers automatically once billing is restored.

issues.description: Issue
Assign a random coach from that 20 coaches don't only use nisha !!!!! Plan this Nicely

fix.description: Root cause: coach assignment only randomized among EXACT-best scoring ties, so a single top-scorer won every matching profile - the same coach (Nisha/Rohan) got assigned over and over. Fix (deployed, backend acb968c): assignment now spreads across the TOP TIER (within 2 pts of best); the stable per-user hash fans different users across that tier. Verified on prod (60 synthetic users): a male/fat_loss/non-veg profile now spreads across 6 coaches (Amira, Hana, Meera, Zara, Rohan, Nisha) instead of always Nisha. Same user still keeps the same coach (idempotent). Note: veg/vegan users still funnel to fewer coaches because the veg-specialist pool is small - wider variety there needs more veg coaches (tracked under 9151).
